title: Use prepared image for WSL machine init
body:
Fixes: #14698

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```release-note
podman machine init on Windows now fetches an image with packages pre-installed
```

comments.body:
Rebased and making use of native errors now.

Also changed:
```diff
-	fmt.Println("Importing operating system into WSL (this may take 5+ minutes on a new WSL install)...")
+	fmt.Println("Importing operating system into WSL (this may take a few minutes on a new WSL install)...")
```
as this has dramatically changed.
